instructions.text: Let's review what you learned about writing notes!
instructions.audio: Time to test your writing skills

content.sentence: The Amazon rainforest is very important for producing oxygen for the planet

content.text: Ingredients for cookies: flour, sugar, eggs, butter, chocolate chips
content.question: Bullets or numbers?
content.explanation: Ingredients can be gathered in any order

content.instruction: Put in order: how to wash hands
Group these under Science or Math

content.task: Take these messy notes and improve them
content.messyNotes: cookies need flour sugar eggs butter and chocolate chips first mix dry stuff then add wet stuff and bake
content.improvedNotes:
Ingredients:
• flour
• sugar
• eggs
• butter
• chocolate chips

Steps:
1. Mix dry ingredients
2. Add wet ingredients
3. Bake
